data.title: Ecommerce Trends: 3 types of features ecommerce platforms are betting on in 2026
data.description: For integrations, AI agents and more, the most popular ecommerce platforms among leading online retailers in North America have clear use cases in mind as they compete for retailers' websites in the year ahead.

data.title: Unilever inks five-year AI and cloud partnership with Google Cloud
data.description: The deal underscores a broader push among consumer-packaged goods companies to invest in cloud infrastructure and generative AI.

data.title: Genuine Parts dives deeper into investment in digital, data tools
data.description: Chief financial officer Bert Nappier said digital systems will consume a sizable portion of the company’s 2026 capital plan.

data.title: Genuine Parts split will accelerate B2B digital strategy
data.description: Separation reflects a broader shift in wholesale distribution, where digital capability is increasingly central to market share gains.

data.title: Radial launches new Commerce Solutions services for payments and fraud prevention
data.description: The new options mark an expansion for Radial as it groups technology-driven offerings into the Commerce Solution portfolio as it prepares to transition toward becoming paxon in 2026.
